g.text: Stop at the snag to help.
Chase the leaders along the race wall.
Run to the fork at the {A_ISLAND}.
Take the wheel side, under the {A1_WHEEL...
Take the wall side, past the miller's wi...
Sprint after both boats to the line.
Race the freed {COMPANION} down the outf...
Run flat out for the finish.
Run up to the blocked {A1_WALL_CHUTE} mo...
Untangle the spinning pair from the plan...
Meet the big kids pounding back along th...
Ride high on their shoulders to the line...
Let the last boats through, then look up...
Scramble down and run for the {A1_WALL_C...
Sprint beside her for the line.
Lever the curtain from the footbridge.
Crew up and chase the fleet.
Point at the seam and fix {FRIEND_BOAT} ...
Push hard for the meadow merge.
Wrestle your own pole free first.
Chase the race with the long net.
Run her home with the fleet.
Kneel at the parapet with the short net.
Follow the slow parade of boats.
Creep the low track, staying with your b...
Climb the top path to get ahead at the p...
Stay and shore up the bank yourself.
Sit back and watch the tunnel mouth.
Turn at the sound of running boots.
Stay and rope off the nest bank with {B1...
Sprint the field path to the finish.
Stop at the fork and choose.
Guard the narrows with your net.
Keep passing stones till the bank holds.
Watch the next boats come down.
Free your {COMPANION} first, she is near...
Jog the bank to the finish.
Come down the rise to the pool.
Cross the plank walk and swing the boom.
Wave the fleet into the lane.
Look from the convoy to the lane and bac...
Let the convoy run and cheer them throug...
Follow the convoy to the pool's lip.
Chase the fleet down the merge.
Cheer the survivors through the jam.
Work the {B2_BOOM_PIN} loose for the ful...
Watch the fleet take the thread.
Follow the armada out of the pool.
Ask her to teach you the {C_WINDLASS}.
Run the lower cut beside the two boats.
Sail them on together and let the line d...
Run the last stretch with them.
Stay with them to the line.
Look up from your first worked gate.
Hand back the {C_WINDLASS} and run for t...
Close the last gate and turn around.
Race the {C_LOCK} water down the last st...
Keep pace along the sluice wall.
Run down to the white post.
Let her run the {C2_BYWASH} to the fan.
Scoop her out and portage the island.
Meet the {TWINS} at the gravel fan.
Take the bridge and pull the {C2_GRATING...
Shout the {TWINS} the pin trick and run ...
Relaunch the {TWINS}' boats in the calm.
Catch the fleet at the merge.
Run the last bend with her.
Skip the trade and relaunch at the stone...
Carry her down to the stone step.
Chase her down the last reach.
Watch the wind come across the reach.
Stay with her to the end.
